thread_recent.content:
Got it. Did you want to reset the conversation context, or reset your project/workspace?

- Conversation: I’ll forget prior context and treat your next message as a fresh start.
- Project/workspace: Tell me what to reset. Pick any of these (reply with numbers):
  1) Git clean reset (hard reset to HEAD, remove untracked incl. build artifacts)
  2) JS/TS deps (remove `node_modules`/lockfile, reinstall; clear npm/yarn/pnpm cache)
  3) Python env (remove venv, `__pycache__`, `.pytest_cache`, reinstall requirements)
  4) Build artifacts (e.g., `dist`, `build`, `.next`, `.turbo`, `target`, `coverage`)
  5) Docker (stop containers, prune images/volumes)
  6) Editors/tooling (VSCode `.vscode`, `.idea`, tooling caches)

I’ll do a dry-run first (show what would be deleted) and then ask you to confirm before any destructive step.
